author: yorickdowne
content:
Yes we’d love a community call. I’d also love to run a block timing diagram past you (later, need to be at PC) because I’m still trying to understand the nuances.

When is good for you? Do you have a few dates you want to put out?

I just had a call with Jason yesterday and his take is that commit boost will very much be supported by Prysm through the proxy field, and that’s he’s been noodling on this with Terence.

Differing messages from different people - getting clarity will be hugely beneficial.
